revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:水路部 (日本海軍)]]
{{Japanese Navy}} '''Hydrographic Department''' (水路部, Suirobu) was an external bureau of the former {{ill|Imperial Japanese Navy|en|Imperial Japanese Navy|qid=Q219712|lt=Imperial Japanese Navy|1=Imperial Japanese Navy}}, under the {{ill|Ministry of the Navy (Japan)|en|Ministry of the Navy (Japan)|qid=Q713875|lt=Ministry of the Navy (Japan)|1=Ministry of the Navy (Japan)}}. It was responsible for producing {{ill|Nautical chart|en|Nautical chart|qid=Q728502|lt=nautical charts|1=Nautical chart}}, conducting {{ill|oceanographic surveys|ja|海洋測量|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/oceanographic surveys|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and overseeing {{ill|hydrological|ja|海象|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hydrological|1=seiuchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11559219}}, {{ill|meteorological|ja|気象|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/meteorological|1=meteorological phenomenon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16332653}}, and astronomical observations. These functions are currently handled by the {{ill|Hydrographic and Oceanographic Department|ja|海洋情報部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hydrographic and Oceanographic Department|1=Hydrographic and Oceanographic Department|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11558993}} of the {{ill|Japan Coast Guard|en|Japan Coast Guard|qid=Q565418|lt=Japan Coast Guard|1=Japan Coast Guard}}.
== History == === Predecessor === {{ill|Ono Tomogorō|ja|小野友五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Tomogorō|1=Ono Tomogorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6463981}}, a first-term student at the {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|en|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|qid=Q1456184|lt=Nagasaki Naval Training Center|1=Nagasaki Naval Training Center}}, studied celestial and survey techniques beginning in {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}}. During the trans-Pacific voyage of the {{ill|Kanrin Maru|en|Kanrin Maru|qid=Q2698119|lt=Kanrin Maru|1=Kanrin Maru}}, he served as a navigation and surveying officer, taking latitude and longitude readings.<ref name="鈴木(1995)p739">{{Cite book|和書|author=鈴木総兵衛|title=水路部|journal=日本海軍史|volume=6|publisher=海軍歴史保存会|date=1995-11|pages=737-754}}</ref>
In {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}}, Ono participated in the development of the {{ill|Bonin Islands|ja|小笠原諸島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bonin Islands|comment=changed title based on wikidata|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=Ogasawara Islands|qid=Q13383295}} as captain of the Kanrin Maru and conducted surveys in the area, marking the beginning of Japan's hydrographic efforts.<ref name="鈴木(1995)p739" />
In {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=Meiji 2|1=1869}}, the {{ill|Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|qid=Q3276048|lt=Ministry of War|1=Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)}} was established, and later that year, Kawamura Sumiyoshi tasked {{ill|Yanagi Narayoshi|en|Yanagi Narayoshi|qid=Q11534346|lt=Yanagi Narayoshi|1=Yanagi Narayoshi}} and {{ill|Itō Toshiyoshi|en|Itō Toshiyoshi|qid=Q6095347|lt=Itō Shunkichi|1=Itō Toshiyoshi}} with advancing hydrographic projects.<ref name="鈴木(1995)p739" />
In {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=Meiji 3|1=1870}}, aboard the {{ill|Dai-ichi Teibō|ja|第一丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dai-ichi Teibō|1=Dai Ichi Teibō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6135165}}, they collaborated with the British Navy's survey ship HMS Sylvia to survey the southern coast of Honshu, the Shima Peninsula, and other areas.<ref name="鈴木(1995)p740">{{Cite book|和書|author=鈴木総兵衛|title=水路部|journal=日本海軍史|volume=6|publisher=海軍歴史保存会|date=1995-11|pages=740}}</ref>
=== Hydrographic Bureau === On September 12, {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=Meiji 4|1=1871}}, the Ministry of Military Affairs was reorganized, establishing the {{ill|Hydrographic Bureau|ja|水路局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hydrographic Bureau|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 水路部 (日本海軍)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 水路部 (日本海軍)|1=Hydrographic Department (Imperial Japanese Navy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11549259}} within the Navy Department.<ref name="鈴木(1995)p740" />
The bureau was responsible for hydrographic surveys, lighthouses, and nautical markers. Initially, Yanagi Narayoshi, as head of the Hydrographic Section, led a small team of four.<ref name="日本水路史(1971)p17">{{Cite book|和書|author=海上保安庁水路部水路業務100th year 史編集室|title=日本水路史 1871-1971|publisher=日本水路協会|date=1971-12}}</ref>
=== Naval Hydrographic Department === In {{ill|1886|en|1886|qid=Q7822|lt=Meiji 19|1=1886}}, the bureau became an independent agency of the Ministry of the Navy and was renamed the {{ill|Naval Hydrographic Department|ja|海軍水路部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naval Hydrographic Department|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 水路部 (日本海軍)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 水路部 (日本海軍)|1=Hydrographic Department (Imperial Japanese Navy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11549259}}.<ref name="鈴木(1995)p742">{{Cite book|和書|author=鈴木総兵衛|title=水路部|journal=日本海軍史|volume=6|publisher=海軍歴史保存会|date=1995-11|pages=742}}</ref>
== Headquarters == * Initially located in a room at the {{ill|Naval Academy|ja|海軍兵学寮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naval Academy|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 海軍兵学校 (日本)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 海軍兵学校 (日本)|1=Imperial Japanese Naval Academy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2238519}} in Tsukiji, Tokyo.<ref name="鈴木(1995)p740" /> * In {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=Meiji 5|1=1872}}, relocated to temporary facilities after a fire destroyed its original headquarters.<ref name="鈴木(1995)p741" /> * In {{ill|1910|en|1910|qid=Q2075|lt=Meiji 43|1=1910}}, a new building was completed in Tsukiji, Tokyo.<ref name="鈴木(1995)p745">{{Cite book|和書|author=鈴木総兵衛|title=水路部|journal=日本海軍史|volume=6|publisher=海軍歴史保存会|date=1995-11|pages=745}}</ref>
== Notable Leaders == {{Dynamic list}} ;Hydrographic Bureau Chiefs * Yanagi Narayoshi: 1871–1886
== References == {{Reflist|2}}
== See Also == * {{ill|Land Survey Department|ja|陸地測量部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Land Survey Department|1=Land Survey Department|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11658575}}
== External Links == [https://www1.kaiho.mlit.go.jp/ Japan Coast Guard Hydrographic and Oceanographic Department] {{translated page|ja|水路部 (日本海軍)|version=102102912|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:水路部 (日本海軍)]] [[ja:水路部]]
